title: Star Wars Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 2
content:
{{Top|rwm|new|italics=1}} {{ComicCollection |image=[[File:XWRSO2.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Omnibus:
X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 2'' |writer=[[Michael A. Stackpole]] |penciller= |inker= |letterer= |colorist= |cover artist=[[Douglas Wheatley|Doug Wheatley]] |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[October 11]], [[2006]]{{DarkHorse|url=Books/13-911/Star-Wars-Omnibus--X-Wing-Rogue-Squadron-Vol-2-TPB|text=Star Wars: Omnibus--X-Wing Rogue Squadron Vol. 2 TPB}} |other date= |media type=Trade paperback |pages=288 |isbn=1593076193 |isbn2= |timeline=[[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] |series=''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]''/''[[Star Wars Omnibus]]'' |issues=Volume 2 |preceded by=[[Star Wars Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 1|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 1'']] |followed by=[[Star Wars Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 3|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 3'']] }} '''''Star Wars Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 2''''' is a trade paperback release of several issues of ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'' comics. It was published on [[October 11]], [[2006]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''As the Empire withers away and the New Republic grows, one team of ace starfighters takes on the most critical missions to ensure freedom in a galaxy long oppressed—Rogue Squadron! Collecting ''Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' #9—20, this mammoth volume includes ''Battleground Tatooine'', ''The Warrior Princess'' and ''Requiem for a Rogue''. Whether it's keeping a massive weapons cache out of the hands of Jabba the Hutt's would-be successors, brokering peace on a planet racked by civil war, or rescuing a downed cruiser from the jaws of an ancient evil, no task is too treacherous for the heroes of Rogue Squadron!'' ===Back cover summary=== ''As the [[Imperial Remnant|Empire]] withers away and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] grows, one team of ace [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] takes on the most critical mission to ensure freedom in a [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] long oppressed - [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]!'' ''Whether it's keeping a [[Eidolon (Strike-class)|massive weapon's cache]] out of the hand's of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt's]] would-be successors, brokering peace on a [[Eiattu 6|planet]] wracked by civil war, or rescuing a [[Starfaring|downed cruiser]] from the jaws of an ancient evil, no task is too treacherous for these [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] heroes!'' ==Contents== *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron Special|''Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron Special'']] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 9|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 9]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 10|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 10]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 11|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 11]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 12|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 12]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 13|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 13]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 14|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 14]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 15|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 15]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 16|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 16]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 17|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 17]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 18|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 18]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 19|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 19]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 20|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 20]] ==Media== ===Cover gallery=== File:XWRSO2.jpg|Cover File:X-Wing_Rogue_Squadron_Vol_2_cover.png|Cover art ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{DarkHorse|url=Books/13-911/Star-Wars-Omnibus--X-Wing-Rogue-Squadron-Vol-2-TPB|text=Star Wars: Omnibus--X-Wing Rogue Squadron Vol. 2 TPB}} {{XWingRogueSquadronNav}} {{Interlang |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები: ანთოლოგია: X-ფრთებიანები: განდგომილების ესკადრილია, ტომი 2 |pl=Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron 2 }} [[Category:Star Wars Omnibus|X-Wing Rogue Squadron 2]]
